response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the reference lyrics perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized, discarding the extra verses at the end of Song 2 that were not performed in the video (anti-hallucination). Handled the spoken talk section at the end via manual transcription.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed precisely to match the exact start of vocal cord activation. Kept subtitle blocks split logically for readability and translated split sentences seamlessly.

subtitles.original: いつか　キミまで　追いつくかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'll catch up to you someday

subtitles.original: ふたりの　距離は　縮まるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if the distance between us will shrink

subtitles.original: ノドの　乾きも　忘れたまま
subtitles.english: With my dry throat completely forgotten

subtitles.original: 終わらないよ Chase!
subtitles.english: It won't end, Chase!

subtitles.original: キミの代わりは　ひとりもいない
subtitles.english: There is not a single replacement for you

subtitles.original: キミの代わりじゃ　ボクはいらない
subtitles.english: If it's a replacement for you, I don't want it

subtitles.original: 不覚にも　涙がこぼれても
subtitles.english: Even if tears unintentionally fall

subtitles.original: もう　ここはひとつ　笑うしかない
subtitles.english: Now all I can do is laugh

subtitles.original: 今も昔も　これからずっと
subtitles.english: Now, in the past, and forevermore

subtitles.original: かわりの僕は　どこにもいない
subtitles.english: There is no replacement for me anywhere

subtitles.original: あぁ　そうだったのかって　きっと　きっと
subtitles.english: Ah, realizing "so that's how it was," surely, surely

subtitles.original: わかりあえる　その日が来るから
subtitles.english: Because the day we can understand each other will come

subtitles.original: Chase! 今日もひとつ　笑うしかない
subtitles.english: Chase! Today too, all I can do is laugh

subtitles.original: 闇に放り込んだ
subtitles.english: Cast into the darkness

subtitles.original: 想い届いていますか？
subtitles.english: Are my thoughts reaching you?

subtitles.original: 浅い夢の覚め際に毎日
subtitles.english: Every day, upon awakening from a shallow dream

subtitles.original: 伝う涙の理由はどこから
subtitles.english: Where does the reason for these trickling tears come from?

subtitles.original: きっと戻ってくると　頬を撫でる手は冷たくて
subtitles.english: "I will surely return," you said, with a hand caressing my cheek so cold

subtitles.original: ぎゅっと広い背中を　抱きしめた
subtitles.english: I tightly embraced your broad back

subtitles.original: 謳え　謳え　通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, the love song of our path

subtitles.original: たとえ声はしなくとも
subtitles.english: Even if my voice cannot be heard

subtitles.original: 届け　届け　通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Reach, reach, the love song of our path

subtitles.original: 愛する人の為　ずっと笑顔で居るから
subtitles.english: Because I will always wear a smile for the one I love

subtitles.original: 淡い日々の思い出に毎日
subtitles.english: Every day in the memories of those fleeting days

subtitles.original: すがる二人の姿は儚げ
subtitles.english: The figures of the two of us clinging together seem so transient

subtitles.original: ぐっと押さえ続けた　瞳の奥のやさしさが
subtitles.english: The gentleness deep within my eyes that I firmly held back

subtitles.original: ふっと帰り咲く刹那に　溢れる心
subtitles.english: At the moment it suddenly blooms again, my heart overflows

subtitles.original: 止まれ　止まれ　防人恋歌
subtitles.english: Stop, stop, the soldier's love song

subtitles.original: たとえ声はしなくとも
subtitles.english: Even if my voice cannot be heard

subtitles.original: 届け　届け　通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Reach, reach, the love song of our path

subtitles.original: 愛する人の為　ずっと笑顔で居るから
subtitles.english: Because I will always wear a smile for the one I love

subtitles.original: 貴方の為　君の為　また出会う日までの約束
subtitles.english: For you, for you, a promise until the day we meet again

subtitles.original: どんな思いが馳せようと　笑顔で居よう
subtitles.english: No matter what thoughts may race, let's keep smiling

subtitles.original: 遠く　遠く　わかれても
subtitles.english: Even if we are separated far, far away

subtitles.original: 辛い時は　歌に乗せて
subtitles.english: When times are tough, let's put it into a song

subtitles.original: ずっと待っているよと　しがみつく手は震えてて
subtitles.english: "I'll be waiting forever," you said, with your clinging hand trembling

subtitles.original: もっと強く深く深く　抱きしめた
subtitles.english: I embraced you even tighter, deeper and deeper

subtitles.original: 謳え　謳え　通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, the love song of our path

subtitles.original: たとえ声が枯れても
subtitles.english: Even if my voice withers away

subtitles.original: 笑え　笑え　通い路恋歌
subtitles.english: Laugh, laugh, the love song of our path

subtitles.original: あたたかい陽はまだか ずっと　ずっと　謳えるのは
subtitles.english: Is the warm sun not here yet? The reason I can sing on and on...

subtitles.original: 君の声がするから
subtitles.english: ...is because I can hear your voice

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Hi!

subtitles.original: 皆さん！
subtitles.english: Everyone!

subtitles.original: 見てますか？
subtitles.english: Are you watching?

subtitles.original: はい、ということでですね、あきちゃんとはピンクローズを、リィカとは、えー、チェイス！チェイス！チェイス！
subtitles.english: Yes, and so, with Aki-chan, [I sang] Pink Rose, and with Rika, uh, Chase! Chase! Chase!
